query: What are the fire protection requirements?
answer:
The fire protection requirements include a 2-hour fireproofing for structural steel columns and beams using spray-applied cementitious material with a minimum thickness of 1.5 inches, as per IBC Table 601 (STRUCT_SPEC.txt, Section 1.4). A Class I standpipe system is required per IBC 905.3, with outlets on every floor within 150 feet of any point (FIRE_PROTECTION_SPEC.txt, Section 1.5). Additionally, an addressable fire alarm system per NFPA 72, smoke detectors in return air plenums per NFPA 90A, duct smoke detectors at air handling units, and manual pull stations at all exits are mandated (FIRE_PROTECTION_SPEC.txt, Section 1.6). Wet pipe sprinkler systems must comply with NFPA 13 (2022 Edition) and local AHJ requirements (FIRE_PROTECTION_SPEC.txt, Section 21 13 13).
